'''Shen''' was a [[Technician/Legends|technician]] in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] under [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Anselm]]. Anselm selected him to be on the team that [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] brought along to the [[Katana fleet]]<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>. He was seriously wounded while defending the ''[[Katana]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
